title: Can certain columns be locked until others are completed?
excerpt:

posts.author: clominchar (Caroline Lominchar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I have the questions that user LaurelOnco360 had in July 2020 and Zachk11 had Jun 2023.
I am hoping a solution has been found but have not been able to find it myself.

We would like to make sure that specific fields are completed before the status is changed Manually. Is there a way to “lock” the Status before specific fields are filled (similar to required questions on a form but on the board itself)?

Thank you.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Caroline,

At this time we have this type of feature currently available on our monday Sales CRM Enterprise product. We do not yet have confirmation if this feature will be released to further products, including Work Management, however do stay tuned for updates in the future

posts.author: clominchar (Caroline Lominchar)
posts.cookedHtml:
I see, Thank you!

I look forward to this.

On Sales CRM Enterprise, how would this feature be called or look, please?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: No problem! This feature is called Conditional Status Change

posts.author: clominchar (Caroline Lominchar)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you so much!

posts.author: mharvey (Meegan Harvey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca
Is this function available to Enterprise accounts, not just CRM?
This is a really useful function I’m keen to utilise on many boards.
